name: RAG knowledge retrieval with Exa and Claude
description: Takes a user question, performs knowledge retrieval using Exa web search, feeds the retrieved context to Claude AI for a grounded answer, and posts the response to Slack with source citations.

source.originalName: RAG Starter Template using Simple Vector Stores, Form trigger and OpenAI

exaKey.description: Exa connection key for web search

slackChannel.description: Slack channel to post the answer

question.description: The question to answer using RAG retrieval

numResults.description: Number of Exa search results to retrieve

steps.name: Search for relevant knowledge with Exa
Build RAG prompt with retrieved context
Run Claude AI for RAG answer generation
Build Slack Block Kit answer with sources
